name: Knowledge IQ
description: Enterprise knowledge query agent providing unified search and retrieval across Gmail, Google Drive, Jira, Confluence, GitHub, SharePoint, and CRM data sources. Supports per-user RAG document uploads and semantic search.

skills.name: Knowledge Base Search
skills.description: Semantic search across user-uploaded documents in the per-user RAG corpus.
skills.input: Natural language question or search terms
skills.output: Ranked document chunks with source, text, and relevance score
examples: Find our refund policy
Search for the Q3 product roadmap
What does our onboarding guide say about leave entitlements?

skills.name: Gmail Search
skills.description: Search and retrieve emails from the connected Google Workspace Gmail account.
skills.input: Natural language email query (sender, subject, date range, keywords)
skills.output: Matching email threads with subject, sender, date, and body snippet
examples: Find emails from alice@acme.com this week
Show unread emails about the product launch
What did Maya send about the contract renewal?

skills.name: Google Drive Search
skills.description: Search and retrieve documents, spreadsheets, and presentations from Google Drive.
skills.input: Natural language file query or keyword
skills.output: Matching files with name, type, owner, and last modified date
examples: Find the sales deck from last quarter
Get the content of the pricing spreadsheet
Search Drive for the engineering onboarding checklist

skills.name: Jira Search
skills.description: Query Jira issues using JQL or natural language across connected Jira projects.
skills.input: JQL string or natural language description of issues to find
skills.output: List of matching issues with key, summary, status, assignee, and priority
examples: Find open bugs assigned to the platform team
Show all Jira tickets in progress for project KIQ
Get the details of ticket KIQ-142

skills.name: GitHub Search
skills.description: Search repositories, commits, pull requests, and issues in the connected GitHub organisation.
skills.input: Natural language query about code, commits, or pull requests
skills.output: Matching repositories, commits, PRs, or issues with metadata
examples: List open pull requests in the stratova-gcp repo
Find recent commits mentioning 'session service'
What issues are open in the admin-iq repository?

skills.name: Confluence Search
skills.description: Search pages and spaces in the connected Atlassian Confluence instance.
skills.input: Natural language query or CQL expression
skills.output: Matching pages with title, space, last updated, and content excerpt
examples: Find the engineering architecture decision records
Search Confluence for the incident response runbook
Get the content of the API design guidelines page

skills.name: SharePoint Search
skills.description: Search documents and files in connected Microsoft SharePoint sites.
skills.output: Matching SharePoint documents with name, site, path, and modified date
examples: Find the HR policy documents on SharePoint
Search SharePoint for the vendor contract templates
Get the latest compliance checklist from SharePoint

skills.name: Gemini Enterprise Connectors
skills.description: Search across all Gemini Enterprise connected data sources (email, calendar, Drive, third-party SaaS) using the Gemini Connector API.
skills.output: Ranked results from all connected enterprise sources
examples: What was discussed about Acme Corp across all sources?
Find everything related to the Q4 planning cycle
Summarise all activity for deal HS-1234

skills.name: CRM Operations
skills.description: Read and manage HubSpot CRM records — contacts, companies, deals, and activities — via the CRM Agent sub-agent.
skills.input: Natural language CRM query or instruction
skills.output: CRM records with relevant fields and relationship context
examples: Find the HubSpot deal for Acme Corp
What is the pipeline stage for deal HS-9821?
List all contacts at vantageclinical.com

skills.name: Company Enrichment
skills.description: Enrich company profiles with firmographic data (headcount, industry, technology stack, funding) using the Enrichment Agent.
skills.output: Enriched company profile with headcount, industry, HQ location, and tech stack
examples: Enrich company for maya@vantageclinical.com
Get firmographic data for acme.com
What is the headcount and industry for clearbit.com?
